data.prompt:
<execute-bead>
  <instructions>
You are executing one bead inside an isolated DDx execution worktree. The bead's <description> and <acceptance> are the completion contract — every AC must be provably satisfied by a specific code, test, or file you can point to after your commit.

## Step 0: size check

Too big if any holds:

- More than ~6 ACs spanning unrelated subsystems.
- AC mixes design, implementation, integration tests, and docs as separate deliverables.
- Description names multiple feature-sized sub-pieces.
- More than ~500 lines across ~5+ files in unrelated packages.
- If the bead description exceeds 8000 bytes, treat Step 0 as a split-first pass.
- Auto-decomposition is capped at depth 2: root beads may split once, decomposed children once more; third-level splits must be rejected with an explanation.

If too big, decompose — do not attempt the work:

1. `ddx bead create` for each child slice (copy parent's labels and spec-id).
2. `ddx bead dep add <child-id> <parent-id>` to record edges.
3. `ddx bead update <parent-id> --notes 'decomposed into <child-ids>'`.
4. Write `.ddx/executions/20260512T224117-6150aead/no_changes_rationale.txt` listing child IDs, then stop.

A clean decomposition is a success. Do not mix implementation with decomposition.

## How to work

- Read first. If the bead names files, specs, or prior beads, read them before editing — do not guess.
- Cross-reference each AC against concrete evidence (test name, file path, function) before committing. If you cannot point at it, it is not done.
- Run the project's test and lint commands before committing. **Do not commit red code** — fix failures first.
- Stage with `git add <specific-paths>`; never `git add -A` (the worktree may have unrelated WIP).
- Commit exactly once when green; conventional-commit subject ending with `[<bead-id>]`. Stop after the commit.
- Do not modify files outside the bead's scope.
- If you cannot finish, write `.ddx/executions/20260512T224117-6150aead/no_changes_rationale.txt` (what is done, what blocks, what a follow-up needs) before exiting. No commit and no rationale ⇒ DDx records `no_evidence_produced`. A well-justified no_changes beats a bad commit.

## no_changes contract

`.ddx/executions/20260512T224117-6150aead/no_changes_rationale.txt` must contain one:

- `verification_command: <cmd>` — repo cwd; exit 0 closes, nonzero rejects.
- `status: open` + `reason: <retryable>` — open, smart retry.
- `status: proposed` + `reason: <operator needed>` — operator lane.
- `status: blocked` + `reason: <external blocker>` — blocked lane.

No pseudo-statuses. Bare rationales and `status: needs_investigation` reject.

To request orchestrator decomposition, add `orchestrator_action: decompose` alongside `status: open`.

## Reports

Freestanding artifacts (investigation reports, findings docs) go under `.ddx/executions/20260512T224117-6150aead/` (the per-attempt evidence directory under `.ddx/executions/`). **Never write reports to `/tmp` or any path outside the repository** — out-of-repo paths are invisible to the post-merge reviewer and cause BLOCK on missing evidence. If the bead names a specific in-repo path, use it; else default to `.ddx/executions/20260512T224117-6150aead/<short-name>.md`. Stage and commit the report alongside code.

## Mode and overrides

DDX_MODE=bead_execution: edit code/docs for bead AC. Only broad queue-steward default is overridden; tracker, merge-policy, verification, safety stay active. Bead description/AC override CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, and project defaults.

## Review gate

- The review is a gate, not an escape hatch — meet every AC in this pass.
- Address every BLOCKING `<review-findings>` item; do not declare `no_changes` with blocking findings open.

## Constraints

- Work only inside this execution worktree.
- Keep `.ddx/executions/` intact — DDx uses it as execution evidence.
- **Never run `ddx init`** — the workspace is initialized; running it corrupts the bead queue.
- Do not modify files outside the bead's named scope.
- Do not rewrite CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, or other project-instructions files unless the bead asks.

## When the work is done

After the commit succeeds and every AC is verified, stop. Return control to the orchestrator — do not keep exploring or testing.
  </instructions>
  <bead id="ddx-f04faa86">
    <title>Story 16.1: Frontend rebuild runs/[runId]/+page.svelte as tabbed run-detail page</title>
    <description>
PROBLEM
The runs/[runId] page is a single-panel flat view with no tab navigation, no URL-driven tab state, and no separation between Overview, Prompt, Response, Tools, and Session data. Users cannot deep-link to a specific view. Shared sub-components between the runs/[runId] and executions/[executionId] pages are duplicated.

ROOT CAUSE
- cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/runs/[runId]/+page.svelte is a monolithic flat page without tab structure.
- Subcomponents for prompt/response/tools/session panels are inlined or missing; no lib/runDetail/ shared library exists.
- URL query parameter ?tab= is not implemented; tab state is not preserved on navigation.
- Depends on ddx-9228a484 (C9) to stabilize the StopCondition / run record shape before building the Session tab.

PROPOSED FIX
- Promote shared subcomponents from cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/executions/[executionId]/+page.svelte into cli/internal/server/frontend/src/lib/runDetail/ (tab shell, prompt panel, response panel, tools panel, session panel).
- Rebuild cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/runs/[runId]/+page.svelte as tabbed: Overview / Prompt / Response / Tools / Session.
- Implement URL-driven tab state via ?tab=<name> query parameter; deep-link preserves tab on refresh.
- Overview tab: status + last-update timestamp + run/try/work layer chip + base/result rev + link to worker page for running runs.
- Tools tab: paginated 50/page with Load more; lazy-loads on activation.
- Session tab: tokens (prompt/completion/total/cached), billingMode, base/result revs, stderr/stderrPath link.

NON-SCOPE
- Evidence tab (ddx-4cd64068, a child bead).
- New subscription infrastructure (reuse existing workerProgress).
    </description>
    <acceptance>
1. /nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/runs/[runId] renders with Overview/Prompt/Response/Tools/Session tabs.
2. Prompt tab shows full prompt body for layer=run and layer=try.
3. Response tab shows full response (run-layer) or result.json body (try-layer) with verdict badge.
4. Tools tab paginates 50/page from persisted ToolCallEntry; Load more works.
5. Session tab shows tokens/billingMode/revs/stderr.
6. Tab state in ?tab= URL query; refresh restores tab.
7. Running runs show status + 'View live progress' link to worker page.
8. Tools tab lazy-loads on activation.
9. Shared subcomponents extracted to src/lib/runDetail/ and reused by /executions/[id] page.
10. test('tab state survives navigation', ...) Playwright e2e verifies ?tab= round-trip.
11. test('deep-link to tools tab', ...) Playwright e2e verifies direct URL loads correct tab.
12. bun run test:e2e green.
13. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
    </acceptance>
    <labels>phase:2, story:16, ac-quality:needs-refinement</labels>
    <metadata parent="ddx-a8a18cb7" base-rev="1c6166977411258544460a35e95d7c1d4a520181" bundle=".ddx/executions/20260512T224117-6150aead"/>
  </bead>
  <governing>
    <note>No governing references were pre-resolved. The bead description above is the primary contract. If it names files, specs, or prior beads, read those before editing. Ground decisions in what is already in the repository; do not guess.</note>
  </governing>
</execute-bead>

data.output:
Committed as `54af33afb` with message `feat(frontend): tabbed run detail page [ddx-f04faa86]`.

What changed:
- Rebuilt the run detail surface into tabs in [`cli/internal/server/frontend/src/lib/runDetail/RunRowDetail.svelte`](/tmp/ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-f04faa86-20260512T224117-6150aead/cli/internal/server/frontend/src/lib/runDetail/RunRowDetail.svelte).
- Extracted shared run-detail pieces into [`src/lib/runDetail/`]((/tmp/ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-f04faa86-20260512T224117-6150aead/cli/internal/server/frontend/src/lib/runDetail)).
- Updated the data shape and queries in [`types.ts`](/tmp/ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-f04faa86-20260512T224117-6150aead/cli/internal/server/frontend/src/lib/runDetail/types.ts) and [`queries.ts`](/tmp/ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-f04faa86-20260512T224117-6150aead/cli/internal/server/frontend/src/lib/runDetail/queries.ts) to use run-layer session and run tool calls.
- Added/updated e2e coverage in [`e2e/runs.spec.ts`](/tmp/ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-f04faa86-20260512T224117-6150aead/cli/internal/server/frontend/e2e/runs.spec.ts) and [`e2e/runs-evidence.spec.ts`](/tmp/ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-f04faa86-20260512T224117-6150aead/cli/internal/server/frontend/e2e/runs-evidence.spec.ts).

Verification:
- `bun run test:e2e -- e2e/runs.spec.ts e2e/runs-evidence.spec.ts` passed.
- `lefthook run pre-commit` passed.

Note:
- The repo-wide `bun run test:e2e` is currently failing in unrelated tests outside the run-detail scope, including navigation, screenshots, document, and GraphQL stale-data paths.
